query:
-- Show remaining unmatched services with non-trivial customerNames and their best customer match
SELECT 
  u.externalId,
  u.customerName AS svc_name,
  u.serviceType,
  u.supplierName,
  c.externalId AS cust_id,
  c.name AS cust_name
FROM services u
JOIN customers c ON (
  LOWER(c.name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(TRIM(u.customerName)), '%')
  OR LOWER(TRIM(u.customerName)) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(c.name), '%')
)
WHERE (u.customerExternalId IS NULL OR u.customerExternalId = '')
  AND u.customerName IS NOT NULL AND u.customerName != ''
  AND u.customerName NOT IN ('Unassigned', '(blank)', 'Unknown', 'Enterprise SIM', 'NBN EE')
ORDER BY u.customerName, c.name
LIMIT 20;

  AND u.customerName NOT IN ('Unassigned', '(blank)', 'Unknown', 'Enterprise SIM', 'NBN EE')
